name: Raspberry Marshmallow Bread
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Water + 1/2 cup raspberry, heated liquid
10 oz Frozen red raspberries in heavy syrup, defrost
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yeast with water and raspberry liquid in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Add flour, gluten, salt, baking soda, and mini marshmallows to the yeast mixture.
3. Stir until all ingredients are incorporated and form a soft dough.
4. Place the dough into a greased bread pan.
5. Set the darkness control at 11 o'clock on your breadmaker machine.
6. Select white bread setting and start the cycle.
7. When the breadmaker beeps (approximately 88 minutes into the cycle), add the reserved, well-drained raspberries to the center of the loaf.
8. Allow the bread to finish baking according to the breadmaker's instructions.
